MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nils Rosenquest of Rosenquest & Associates (292.0980) for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Rosenquest presented a proof of service to the Court, and the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT HEIKO GIERATHS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is granted. No opposition filed. Mr. Rosenquest was directed to file the proof of service with the Clerk's office. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189
